title: Gretna Public Schools: Gretna East Media ICE cartoon

communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Nebraska Public Records Act, I hereby request the following records:

1. Any COMMUNICATIONS to or from Andrew Rinaldi, Chad Jepsen, or Travis Lightle concerning Gretna East Media or the publication and/or removal of a cartoon concerning U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE).

 2. Any COMMUNICATIONS to or from Andrew Rinaldi, Chad Jepsen, or Travis Lightle otherwise mentioning any of these terms: "GEM", "Gretna East Media", "ICE", "cartoon", "comic", "censor", "censorship", "controversial", "6390", "amendment", "SPLC", or "student press". 

These requests are limited to records generated, sent, or received on or after January 1, 2026 through the present date.

"COMMUNICATIONS" means and includes emails, text messages, direct messages sent via social media (but not including comments or messages posted for public view), letters, memoranda, calendar entries, chats, or any other form of one-to-one or one-to-many communication.

Please note that this request seeks public records wherever they may be found, including on devices or networks owned or operated by private parties. For example, if an employee uses a personal cell phone or social media account to conduct public business, records created, maintained, or held on the phone or account are public records subject to this request.

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 4 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Adam Steinbaugh

To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Freedom of Information Act, I hereby request the following records:

All invoices, purchases orders, contracts, loan agreements, statements of work, procurement documents (but not limited to solicitation documents or notices of proposed contracts, proposed bids, unsolicited proposals, and/or documents justifying contracting without full and open competition) relating to the following specific procurement identifiers:

N6945025C0001


The SAM page can be found here: https://sam.gov/workspace/contract/award/view/N6945025C0001?agencyID=9700&modNumber=0&transactionNumber=0&refIdvPiid=null&idvAgencyID=null&contractType=AWARD

This request is not being made for commercial purposes. Any documents obtained from this request will be used in the course of reporting for The Latino Newsletter, a new media outlet that focuses on Latinx issues in the United States (https://thelatinonewsletter.org/)

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 20 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Carlos Berríos Polanco

communications.subject: Freedom of Information Act Request: Juniper Falcon 2021
communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Freedom of Information Act, I hereby request the following records:

Unredacted slides for the "Juniper Falcon 2021 (JF21) Concept Development Conference (CDC)" presentation given in May 2020. You may find an unclassified/FOUO version attached below.

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 20 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Matthew Petti
